name: feedme-cookbook
description: Feedme — a cookbook demo app (Express API + TanStack Start client) for teaching juniors a regular React app.

scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,client -c yellow,cyan "npm run dev -w server" "npm run dev -w client"
scripts.build: npm run build -w server && npm run build -w client
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w server && npm run typecheck -w client
